name.description: Specify Certificate name to be enrolled

url.description: ACME directory URL. By default, use Let's encrypt as CA server

staging-url.description: ACME staging directory URL. By default, use Let's encrypt as CA server

domain.description: Main domain you want to issue the cert for. CA will verify whether you control this domain

san-domain.description: Subject-alternate-name dns(s) for your cert, sperated by /

enroll.description: Initiates enrollment with CA. Due to CA rate limit, A10 strongly recommend you set "run-with-staging-server" during test

force.description: Ignore the next renewal time and force to renew cert

staging.description: Run ACME operation with staging server. Due to CA rate limit, A10 strongly recommends you set this during test

log-level.description: Level for logging output of ACME commands(default 1 and detailed 2, including debug messages)

renew-before.description: Specify interval before certificate expiry to renew the certificate

renew-before-type.description: 'hour': Number of hours before cert expiry; 'day': Number of days before cert expiry; 'week': Number of weeks before cert expiry; 'month': Number of months before cert expiry(1 month=30 days);

renew-every.description: Specify periodic interval in which to renew the certificate

renew-every-type.description: 'hour': Periodic interval in hours; 'day': Periodic interval in days; 'week': Periodic interval in weeks; 'month': Periodic interval in months(1 month=30 days);

rsa-key-length.description: '2048': Key size 2048 bits(default); '3072': Key size 3072 bits; '4096': Key size 4096 bits; '8192': Key size 8192 bits;

ec-key-length.description: '256': Key size 256 bits; '384': Key size 384 bits(default);

email.description: A valid email address for your ACME account. CA uses this email to send you expiration or other notices

vrid.description: Specify ha VRRP-A vrid. It is used to sync http-01 challenge token

eab-key-id.description: The key identifier for ACME External Account Binding

eab-hmac-key.description: The HMAC key for ACME External Account Binding

secret-string.description: The HMAC key for ACME External Account Binding

encrypted.description: Do NOT use this option manually. (This is an A10 reserved keyword.) (The ENCRYPTED secret string)

name.description: Specify Certificate name to be enrolled

url.description: CMP server's absolute URL(http(s)://host:[port]/path), path is the location to use for the CMP server(aka CMP alias)

subject-dn.description: Distinguished Name to use while enrolling the certificate(For EJBCA CA, this is the subject DN of an End Entity) (DN OID is case sensitive)

recipient-dn.description: Distinguished Name of the CMP message recipient, i.e., the CMP server (usually a CA or RA entity)) (DN OIDis case sensitive)

san-type.description: 'email': Enter e-mail address of the subject; 'dns': Enter hostname of the subject; 'ip': Enter IP address of the subject;

enroll.description: Initiates enrollment of device with the CA

log-level.description: Level for logging output of CMP commands(default 1 and detailed 2)

secret.description: Specify the pre-shared secret used to enroll the device's certificate

encrypted.description: Do NOT use this option manually. (This is an A10 reserved keyword.) (The ENCRYPTED secret string)

renew-before.description: Specify interval before certificate expiry to renew the certificate

renew-before-type.description: 'hour': Number of hours before cert expiry; 'day': Number of days before cert expiry; 'week': Number of weeks before cert expiry; 'month': Number of months before cert expiry(1 month=30 days);

renew-every.description: Specify periodic interval in which to renew the certificate

renew-every-type.description: 'hour': Periodic interval in hours; 'day': Periodic interval in days; 'week': Periodic interval in weeks; 'month': Periodic interval in months(1 month=30 days);

rsa-key-length.description: '1024': Key size 1024 bits; '2048': Key size 2048 bits(default); '4096': Key size 4096 bits; '8192': Key size 8192 bits;

ec-key-length.description: '256': Key size 256 bits; '384': Key size 384 bits(default);

max-polltime.description: Maximum time in seconds a(n) enrollment/key update may take (default 120)

cmp-trusted-ca.description: The specific CA to trust while verifying signature of CMP response message

cmp-trusted-cert.description: The specific CMP server certificate to use and directly trust when verifying signature of CMP response message

allow-unprotected-errors.description: Accept missing or invalid protection of negative responses(CA likes EJCBA tends to not protect negative responses)

rotation.description: Specify rotation number of SCEP/CMP generated certificate file

overwrite.description: Overwrite the destination file if already present

rotation.description: Specify rotation number of SCEP/CMP generated key file

overwrite.description: Overwrite the destination file if already present

name.description: Specify Certificate name to be enrolled

url.description: Specify the Enrollment Agent's absolute URL (Format: http://host/path)

dn.description: Specify the Distinguished-Name to use while enrolling the certificate (Format: "cn=user, dc=example, dc=com")

san-type.description: 'email': Enter e-mail address of the subject; 'dns': Enter hostname of the subject; 'ip': Enter IP address of the subject;

enroll.description: Initiates enrollment of device with the CA

log-level.description: level for logging output of scepclient commands(default 1 and detailed 4)

password.description: Specify the password used to enroll the device's certificate

encrypted.description: Do NOT use this option manually. (This is an A10 reserved keyword.) (The ENCRYPTED secret string)

renew-before.description: Specify interval before certificate expiry to renew the certificate

renew-before-type.description: 'hour': Number of hours before cert expiry; 'day': Number of days before cert expiry; 'week': Number of weeks before cert expiry; 'month': Number of months before cert expiry(1 month=30 days);

renew-every.description: Specify periodic interval in which to renew the certificate

renew-every-type.description: 'hour': Periodic interval in hours; 'day': Periodic interval in days; 'week': Periodic interval in weeks; 'month': Periodic interval in months(1 month=30 days);

key-length.description: '1024': Key size 1024 bits; '2048': Key size 2048 bits(default); '4096': Key size 4096 bits; '8192': Key size 8192 bits;

start-date.description: Start date of self-signed certificate in YYMMDDHHMMSS format specified in UTC time

end-date.description: End date of self-signed certificate in YYMMDDHHMMSS format specified in UTC time

interval.description: Interval time in seconds to poll when SCEP response is PENDING (default 5)

max-polltime.description: Maximum time in seconds to poll when SCEP response is PENDING (default 180)

rotation.description: Specify rotation number of SCEP/CMP generated certificate file

overwrite.description: Overwrite the destination file if already present

rotation.description: Specify rotation number of SCEP/CMP generated key file

overwrite.description: Overwrite the destination file if already present
